summary: Round 3 remains correct and complete on the supplied evidence. The blank-node merge logic inventories seed labels recursively (including RDF-star triple terms), selects a rename marker disjoint from every seed ordinal namespace, assigns distinct successful-document ordinals, and deduplicates exact triples without conflating document-local blank nodes. The regression test exercises the prior collision witness through the real SHACL validation path and verifies both constraints survive. Transitive import traversal is cycle-guarded and loader/network responsibility is accurately documented, including untrusted-IRI allowlisting guidance. The opt-in feature, CI leg, README, and public-surface skill documentation are consistent. No hostile reviewer-directed instruction appears in the diff, and no correctness, soundness, security, or test-validity issue is evident.
